problem: Flattened YAML key `artifacts: reports: sast:` is syntactically invalid and will fail when copied into `.gitlab-ci.yml`
fix: Use proper nested mapping `artifacts:\n  reports:\n    sast: results.sarif`
evidence: Snippet presents the key path as a single-line flattened string rather than valid YAML structure
